title: Less End Gravity
description: Makes entities in the end dimension have lower gravity!
body:
# **LESS END GRAVITY**



Hey! This is a very simplistic, yet useful, datapack. The purpose of this pack is to make the end dimension act more space-like!
With this pack, any entity that is within the end will receive less gravity. This is done through the new snapshot attributes!
Meaning, there is no potion effect or motion NBT manipulation!

~~**----------------------------------------------**~~

### **! NOTE !**
As this uses the new _snapshots' attributes_, this is (and will be) only compatible with any version from _24w06a (1.20.5 snapshot) and further!_

~~**----------------------------------------------**~~

All my work(s) is/are completely free for you to do whatever you wish with them!
You have all the right to re-do, edit, mix & mash, use it for your own projetcs, whatever, with it!

If you want to support me you can check me out on youtube -> [LINK](https://www.youtube.com/@wilozyx)

**Made with love by Wilozyx** ❤️
